# Knowledge Source Register Template

Purpose: track internal knowledge sources approved for AI-assisted retrieval, NotebookLM-style notebooks, or Deep Research.

Do not paste source content into this register. Record metadata only.

## Source Entry

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Source title |  |
| Source owner |  |
| Source system | SharePoint / Google Drive / Azure Wiki / repo docs / other |
| Source URL or location |  |
| Project/domain |  |
| Data classification | public / internal / confidential / restricted |
| Contains PII/secrets/customer data? | no / yes / unknown |
| Sanitization required? | no / yes |
| Approved AI use | Copilot reference / NotebookLM / Deep Research / file search |
| Approved audience |  |
| Retention period |  |
| Review cadence | quarterly / semiannual / annual / on change |
| Last reviewed | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Approval owner |  |

## Minimum Acceptance Criteria

- Owner and classification are known.
- Source does not contain secrets or production customer data.
- Usage scope is explicit.
- Access is limited to approved users or groups.
- Source freshness and review cadence are documented.
- Generated answers must cite or name the source.

## Retrieval Keywords

knowledge source register, internal docs inventory, NotebookLM source tracking, AI source approval, data classification, private knowledge governance.
